title: Indian Coal Remains Longest Running Headwind in Dry Bulk Market This Year
section_path: Indian Coal Remains Longest Running Headwind in Dry Bulk Market This Year
section_path_text: Indian Coal Remains Longest Running Headwind in Dry Bulk Market This Year
summary:
Main
By Jeffrey Landsberg
As we discussed at length in Commodore Research's most recent Weekly Executive Report, weakness in India's coal-derived electricity generation and demand for coal imports has remained the longest sustained headwind in the dry bulk market this year. New more recently, though, is that India's coal-derived electricity generation has managed to experience its largest year-on-year contraction since 2020. Image reference: Chart 1.jpg | assets/2025-11-18_indian-coal-remains-longest-running-headwind-in-dry-bulk-market-this-year_img_chart1_b0ad367e2cd3.jpg
Overall, the situation in India continues to worsen.
